since_last: 54% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +5.16%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.09% · BTC +0.46% · Gold +1.92% · Nasdaq100 -0.55%. 54% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +5.16%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +5.16%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.98%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: PUBM is the standout at +8.43%
cards.body: Leaders: PUBM +8.43%, NOW +7.98%, MGNI +7.85%, DV +7.79%, APP +7.32%. Laggards: TER -7.55%, HPE -7.21%, VRT -6.80%, NXPI -6.18%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.63% at $157.03
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.63% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
